decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872') was stale SCHEDULED in state with a 06-15 12:00 UTC slot. Verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, author @voidlinedocs). Auto-published on schedule 15 days ago; state never updated. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Same KNOWN_BAD publish-side drift seen on 06-13.

PIPELINE DARK 15 DAYS. After reconciliation the entire catalogue is PUBLIC with NOTHING scheduled behind it. Last publish = v1_bonus_briggs 06-15; today is 06-30. Next 3 days (Wed 07-01 + Fri 07-03 are Short days per Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun cadence; Thu 07-02) are all empty. No long-form queued for next Sunday 07-05. Agent-log shows no routine activity between 06-14 and 06-30 (17-day gap) — the daily routine appears to have not run. v4 Roanoke stuck at Flow thumb blocker (see LEARNINGS 06-13). KNOWN_BAD: cadence <1/wk means the algo can't categorize the channel. ACTION NEEDED: unblock v4 thumb + render/schedule next batch.
